description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Weekly Build that runs weekly at 10:00 UTC on Sundays and can be manually triggered. The workflow consists of two jobs: darglint and build_posix. The darglint job runs on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.11, checks out the main branch, sets up Python, upgrades pip and setuptools, installs nox, and runs nox darglint. The build_posix job runs on ubuntu-latest and macos-latest with Python 3.7, 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, and 3.11, checks out the main branch, sets up Python, upgrades pip and setuptools, installs nox, and runs nox with specific versions.
